name: What if claim denied after AI firm referral in Chicago?
description: Sue referrer; IL 2 years; link denial to AI.[5]

mainEntity.name: What if claim denied after AI firm referral in Chicago?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue referrer; IL 2 years; link denial to AI.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal internally then sue referrer for negligence; IL 2-year malpractice limit. AI intake errors common pitfalls.[5] Factors: denial reasons tied to referral flaws. Gather underwriting docs. New lawyer essential.
